title: Database backups + restore module (v0.4 carry-over: managed DBs ship without a backup story)
scopeNote: Closes the most prominent v0.4 gap — operator can create / schedule / restore backups for managed DB instances. Local-only, logical (dump-style), routed through the existing v0.5 scheduler module for cron behaviour.

phases.name: Foundation — schema + backups dir + BackupDriver interface
Per-engine drivers (mysql / mariadb / postgresql / redis / mongodb) — stdout pipe + gzip
BackupsService + REST (create / list / delete / restore) + retention prune
Frontend /backups route + drawer tab + restore confirmation + i18n
docs/backups.md + release cut v0.5.0 + Rocky 234 smoke

directionDecisions.Q3_scheduling: new `db_backup` task type on existing scheduler module
directionDecisions.Q6_outputMethod: docker exec stdout pipe + host gzip
